author: SantiMod
content:
Hello Atlassians! 
Today we are hosting the first ever “Who Wants to be an Atlassianaire”    competition! 
 You will be competing for Discord XP, which will then be exchangeable for higher chances of Early Access and other cool benefits...  
 The competition will take place today at 2pm PST on the ⁠unknown  channel. If you want to register as a competitor, react to this message with "  ".
 You can find the rules of the competition on the aforementioned channel 

Disclaimer: winning this competition does not automatically grant you Early Access. This will be achieved by being active in the community channels and helping other fellow Atlassians. (Discord XP is earned this way, winning this competition is a BIG boost for your Discord XP)
